announcement.body_de:
BND TOOLS v2.0 ist jetzt verfügbar!

🔵 **NEUE FEATURES:**
◆ Matrix Rain Effect (#0000CD Blue)
◆ White Scan Animation durch das Logo
◆ Cinematic Boot Sequence
◆ Minimal Matrix Hintergrund beim Prompt
◆ Dual Matrix System (Heavy → Minimal)

📥 **LINKS:**
◆ GitHub: github.com/waaizy9/BND-TOOLS

⭐ Jetzt aktualisieren!

changelog:
BND-TOOLS v2.0.0
- Complete rebrand from Void to BND
- New Matrix Rain boot effect (#0000CD Blue)
- White scan animation through logo
- Heavy matrix rain at start, minimal during prompt
- Clean MIT License
- New folder structure (lib/boot.py)
- German language support

BND-TOOLS v1.0.0
- Initial release
- Basic boot sequence
